posts.text: Sometimes I wish there was a hell

History is going to judge the fact that this man wasn't impeached, removed and arrested so harshly. He's rotting both physically and mentally and everybody is just pretending this is normal.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

TRUMP IN ONE SINGLE EVENT

-- "They won't be there for us"
-- "We have some that are really enthusiastic. They're coming already."
-- "This isn't 'need'"
-- "If we need anything, they should be jumping to help us"
-- "We want them to come and help us with the strait"
-- My attitude

Imagine being JD Vance. Selling out every principle you said you had, cucking your self to a stupid bloviating clown and pretending he's a genius, making the most humiliating arguments that are factually wrong in service of being a little MAGA reek, only to be leapfrogged by a self hating closeted guy only known for trying to starve Cuba to death. Bleak.


Will Steakin (@wsteaks)

NEW: Some GOP donors are already quietly mobilizing behind Rubio for 2028 — plotting ways to boost him over Vance, i

Fucking for virginity. Eating for fasting. Words have no meaning anymore.


Acyn (@Acyn)
